name: mojo-public-api-table-update
description: Update the public API comment table in a Mojo __init__.mojo to distinguish available-now exports from pending-implementation symbols. Use when: (1) live exports were added but the API table still lists them as pending, (2) a flat 'will be available once implementation completes' list needs splitting into 'available now' vs 'pending' sections, (3) a newly-added symbol is missing from the ASCII table of top-level exports.
